name: claudinho
description: Live scores, fixtures, and group standings for the 2026 men's football tournament. Not affiliated with FIFA or Anthropic.
long_description: Ask Claude about the 2026 men's football tournament — live scores, today's fixtures, a team's next match, group standings, and read-only prediction-market odds (informational only, not betting advice). Facts and emoji flags only; no logos, crests, or footage. An independent, open-source fan project. Not affiliated with or endorsed by FIFA or Anthropic.

tools.name: get_today
tools.description: Fixtures for a date (default: today), with live scores overlaid.

tools.name: get_live
tools.description: Matches currently in play, with score and minute.

tools.name: get_match
tools.description: A single match by its id, with live state if available.

tools.name: get_standings
tools.description: Group table(s) — one group A–L, or all.

tools.name: get_next_fixture
tools.description: A team's next scheduled match (3-letter code, e.g. MEX).

tools.name: get_market_signal
tools.description: Read-only prediction-market odds for a match, a team's next fixture, or a date. Informational only; no links.

tools.name: get_share_snippet
tools.description: A copy-pasteable match-card snippet for a match, a team's next fixture, a date, or live. Plain text; carries the disclaimer.
